category_sources: source_facts.description says Free and Open Source empire-building strategy game; official homepage says Freeciv is a free and open source empire-building strategy game.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub organization use Freeciv; source_facts.name is freeciv.
docs_sources: Official homepage navigation links its Wiki; the wiki includes the Freeciv manual pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage links Freeciv GitHub, whose organization pins freeciv/freeciv as the upstream repository for the standalone client and server.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe the strategy game; source_facts.executables list client, server, manual, and GTK tools.
